hero.subtitle: Upload a photo of your room and instantly transform it with any style. Powered by Gemini 3 Pro for photorealistic results.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful tools for interior designers and decorators.

styleTransfer.title: Style Transfer
styleTransfer.desc: Upload a room photo and apply any style, or transfer the look from another image instantly.

gemini.title: Gemini 3 Pro
gemini.desc: Powered by the latest Gemini 3 Pro Image model for stunning, photorealistic generations.

video.title: Video Conversion
video.desc: Turn your static designs into immersive walkthrough videos using Kling AI technology.

credit.title: Credit System
credit.desc: Flexible credit system. Buy credits and share them with your team for collaborative work.

gallery.title: Smart Gallery
gallery.desc: Organize your generated designs in a beautiful gallery. Share collections with clients easily.

editing.title: AI Editing
editing.desc: Refine your images with simple text commands. Change colors, furniture, or lighting in seconds.

auth.signInToAccess: Sign in to your Interior AI account

auth.enterEmail: Enter your email to receive instructions

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome to your private dashboard! Here you can manage your designs and account settings.

myDesigns.title: My Designs
myDesigns.desc: View and edit your saved room designs.

newProject.title: New Project
newProject.desc: Start a new interior design project.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your design studio today.
dashboard.lowCreditDesc: Your studio is running low on credits. Distribute some now or top up to avoid interruption.

team.title: Team Management
team.subtitle: Organize your locations and team members efficiently

projects.title: Projects

credits.title: Credits Management
credits.subtitle: Top up your balance to keep generating designs.
credits.agencyDesc: Unlock collaborative features and bulk credit sharing for your entire interior design studio.
credits.faqA1: Yes, each photorealistic AI generation costs exactly one credit.
credits.faqA2: Never. Your purchased credits stay in your account forever until used.
